title: Amendment in the notification regarding Prohibition of the manufacture, sale of Fixed dose combinationf of Metoclopramide except combination of Metoclopramide with AspirinParacetamol_Section

Aji^uwryg afa: ^n,H/^m1di*i1ei % ~#!ft^ % fa^ 3p*r afafaqf %^w AJl^MHug %'PrwRraT^f #qfaff*Bn ftra^r, 2002"^ i" [TO U T^RT.-11014/7/2001 -TStTJ^TTJST"^itT^TJ] MK r^OTVII : "TO 3Tfa*I^T MTOT % TT3N7 3 m^.fH. -H. 578(«f) tfrfftST 23-7-1983 ERT "SWTftm **ft ^ eft afa 3 ^ f affiPT ^fttTT^I.^JT.'Pl. 169(3fT)TV#W 12-3-2001 SfTf**H'W «TTI 2648 GI/2001 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF HEALTH AND FAMILY WELFARE (Department of Health) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 24th August, 2001 G.S.R. 603(E).—Wherase the Central Government is satisfied that the use of the fixed dose combination of Metoclopramide with other drugs except fixed dose combination of Metoclopramide with Aspirin/Paracetamol contains ingredients in such quantity for which there is no therapeutic justification and it is necessary and expedient to prohibit the manufacture, sale or distribution of the said fixed dose combination in public interest. Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by Section 26 A of the Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940 (23 of 1940), the Central Government hereby makes the following further amendment in the Notification of the Government of India in the Minsitry of Health and Family Welfare, No. GSR 578(E) dated 23 rd July, 1983, namely :— In the Table appended to the said Notification, for serial No. 38 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial No. and the entry shall be substituted, namely:— "38. Fixed dose combination of Metoclopramide with other drugs except combination of Metoclopramide with Aspirin/Paracetamol with effect from 1st September, 2002." [F. No. X-11014/7/2001-DMS &PFA] DEEPAK GUPTA, Jt. Secy. Footnote: The Principal Notification was published m the Gazette otlndiavide GSR No. 578(E) dated 23-7-1983 andlast amended vide GSR 169(E) dated 12-3-2001.
